messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for tsp_construct evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: tsp_construct. Population features: fit, distance, bonus, capacity, cubic. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: tsp_farthest_insertion: TSP farthest-style selection: visit distant clusters earlier to avoid isolated tail costs.
tsp_nearest_insertion: TSP insertion-aware selection: balance current distance and return-to-destination distance.

negative_messages.content: tsp_nearest_neighbor: TSP baseline: select nearest unvisited node from current_node.
tsp_regret_insertion: TSP regret selection: prioritize nodes whose alternatives worsen quickly.
tsp_two_opt_awareness: TSP 2-opt-aware selection: avoid locally long edges likely to create crossings.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for bp_online evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: bp_online. Population features: saturation, polynomial. Select 3 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: obp_best_fit: Best-fit scoring: prefer feasible bin with minimum residual capacity after placing the item.
obp_eoh_util_sqrt_exp: EoH-style smooth score: mix utilization, sqrt residual terms, and exp decay gap penalty.
obp_first_fit: Online bin packing baseline: prefer the earliest feasible bin to reduce new-bin creation.

negative_messages.content: obp_worst_fit: Worst-fit scoring: prefer larger residual capacity to keep bins balanced for later items.
obp_harmonic: Harmonic-style scoring: adapt bin preference by item size class relative to capacity.
obp_funsearch_residual_poly: FunSearch-style residual penalty: combine tight-fit reward with polynomial penalty on unusable gaps.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for cvrp_construct evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: cvrp_construct. Population features: threshold, cap_ratio, harmonic, alignment, chain. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: cvrp_far_first: CVRP far-first: seed routes toward distant clusters, switch to nearest once en route.
cvrp_nearest_capacity: CVRP nearest-first: select closest feasible customer, treat capacity as constraint not score.

negative_messages.content: cvrp_savings: CVRP savings: score by Clarke-Wright savings, demand is binary feasibility only.
cvrp_sweep: CVRP sweep-style selection: keep each route within a depot-centered angular sector.
cvrp_regret_insertion: CVRP regret: prefer customers with high detour regret, capacity is feasibility not score.

<Query>: Problem: cvrp_construct. Population features: insertion. Select 3 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: cvrp_far_first: CVRP far-first: seed routes toward distant clusters, switch to nearest once en route.
cvrp_nearest_capacity: CVRP nearest-first: select closest feasible customer, treat capacity as constraint not score.
cvrp_regret_insertion: CVRP regret: prefer customers with high detour regret, capacity is feasibility not score.

negative_messages.content: cvrp_savings: CVRP savings: score by Clarke-Wright savings, demand is binary feasibility only.
cvrp_sweep: CVRP sweep-style selection: keep each route within a depot-centered angular sector.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for bp_online evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: bp_online. Population features: harmonic, route. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: obp_best_fit: Best-fit scoring: prefer feasible bin with minimum residual capacity after placing the item.
obp_eoh_util_sqrt_exp: EoH-style smooth score: mix utilization, sqrt residual terms, and exp decay gap penalty.

negative_messages.content: obp_first_fit: Online bin packing baseline: prefer the earliest feasible bin to reduce new-bin creation.
obp_worst_fit: Worst-fit scoring: prefer larger residual capacity to keep bins balanced for later items.
obp_harmonic: Harmonic-style scoring: adapt bin preference by item size class relative to capacity.
obp_funsearch_residual_poly: FunSearch-style residual penalty: combine tight-fit reward with polynomial penalty on unusable gaps.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for tsp_construct evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: tsp_construct. Population features: chain, remaining_aware, sqrt, penalty. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: tsp_farthest_insertion: TSP farthest-style selection: visit distant clusters earlier to avoid isolated tail costs.
tsp_nearest_insertion: TSP insertion-aware selection: balance current distance and return-to-destination distance.

negative_messages.content: tsp_nearest_neighbor: TSP baseline: select nearest unvisited node from current_node.
tsp_regret_insertion: TSP regret selection: prioritize nodes whose alternatives worsen quickly.
tsp_two_opt_awareness: TSP 2-opt-aware selection: avoid locally long edges likely to create crossings.

<Query>: Problem: bp_online. Population features: savings, exponential, insertion, harmonic, fit. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: obp_best_fit: Best-fit scoring: prefer feasible bin with minimum residual capacity after placing the item.
obp_eoh_util_sqrt_exp: EoH-style smooth score: mix utilization, sqrt residual terms, and exp decay gap penalty.

negative_messages.content: obp_first_fit: Online bin packing baseline: prefer the earliest feasible bin to reduce new-bin creation.
obp_worst_fit: Worst-fit scoring: prefer larger residual capacity to keep bins balanced for later items.
obp_harmonic: Harmonic-style scoring: adapt bin preference by item size class relative to capacity.
obp_funsearch_residual_poly: FunSearch-style residual penalty: combine tight-fit reward with polynomial penalty on unusable gaps.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for cvrp_construct evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: cvrp_construct. Population features: fragmentation, greedy, distance, swap. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: cvrp_sweep: CVRP sweep-style selection: keep each route within a depot-centered angular sector.
cvrp_far_first: CVRP far-first: seed routes toward distant clusters, switch to nearest once en route.

negative_messages.content: cvrp_nearest_capacity: CVRP nearest-first: select closest feasible customer, treat capacity as constraint not score.
cvrp_savings: CVRP savings: score by Clarke-Wright savings, demand is binary feasibility only.
cvrp_regret_insertion: CVRP regret: prefer customers with high detour regret, capacity is feasibility not score.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for tsp_construct evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: tsp_construct. Population features: greedy. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: tsp_farthest_insertion: TSP farthest-style selection: visit distant clusters earlier to avoid isolated tail costs.
tsp_nearest_insertion: TSP insertion-aware selection: balance current distance and return-to-destination distance.

negative_messages.content: tsp_nearest_neighbor: TSP baseline: select nearest unvisited node from current_node.
tsp_regret_insertion: TSP regret selection: prioritize nodes whose alternatives worsen quickly.
tsp_two_opt_awareness: TSP 2-opt-aware selection: avoid locally long edges likely to create crossings.

negative_messages.content: obp_first_fit: Online bin packing baseline: prefer the earliest feasible bin to reduce new-bin creation.
obp_worst_fit: Worst-fit scoring: prefer larger residual capacity to keep bins balanced for later items.

obp_funsearch_residual_poly: FunSearch-style residual penalty: combine tight-fit reward with polynomial penalty on unusable gaps.

messages.content:

positive_messages.content: cvrp_far_first: CVRP far-first: seed routes toward distant clusters, switch to nearest once en route.
cvrp_nearest_capacity: CVRP nearest-first: select closest feasible customer, treat capacity as constraint not score.

negative_messages.content: cvrp_savings: CVRP savings: score by Clarke-Wright savings, demand is binary feasibility only.
cvrp_sweep: CVRP sweep-style selection: keep each route within a depot-centered angular sector.
cvrp_regret_insertion: CVRP regret: prefer customers with high detour regret, capacity is feasibility not score.

positive_messages.content: tsp_farthest_insertion: TSP farthest-style selection: visit distant clusters earlier to avoid isolated tail costs.

negative_messages.content: tsp_nearest_neighbor: TSP baseline: select nearest unvisited node from current_node.

tsp_two_opt_awareness: TSP 2-opt-aware selection: avoid locally long edges likely to create crossings.

messages.content:

<Query>: Problem: bp_online. Population features: alignment, distance, exponential, local_search, residual. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: obp_best_fit: Best-fit scoring: prefer feasible bin with minimum residual capacity after placing the item.

negative_messages.content: obp_first_fit: Online bin packing baseline: prefer the earliest feasible bin to reduce new-bin creation.
obp_worst_fit: Worst-fit scoring: prefer larger residual capacity to keep bins balanced for later items.
obp_harmonic: Harmonic-style scoring: adapt bin preference by item size class relative to capacity.
obp_funsearch_residual_poly: FunSearch-style residual penalty: combine tight-fit reward with polynomial penalty on unusable gaps.

<Query>: Problem: bp_online. Population features: harmonic, spread. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: obp_best_fit: Best-fit scoring: prefer feasible bin with minimum residual capacity after placing the item.
obp_eoh_util_sqrt_exp: EoH-style smooth score: mix utilization, sqrt residual terms, and exp decay gap penalty.

negative_messages.content: obp_first_fit: Online bin packing baseline: prefer the earliest feasible bin to reduce new-bin creation.
obp_worst_fit: Worst-fit scoring: prefer larger residual capacity to keep bins balanced for later items.
obp_harmonic: Harmonic-style scoring: adapt bin preference by item size class relative to capacity.
obp_funsearch_residual_poly: FunSearch-style residual penalty: combine tight-fit reward with polynomial penalty on unusable gaps.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for tsp_construct evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: tsp_construct. Population features: (initial round, no population info). Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: tsp_farthest_insertion: TSP farthest-style selection: visit distant clusters earlier to avoid isolated tail costs.
tsp_nearest_insertion: TSP insertion-aware selection: balance current distance and return-to-destination distance.

negative_messages.content: tsp_nearest_neighbor: TSP baseline: select nearest unvisited node from current_node.
tsp_regret_insertion: TSP regret selection: prioritize nodes whose alternatives worsen quickly.
tsp_two_opt_awareness: TSP 2-opt-aware selection: avoid locally long edges likely to create crossings.

messages.content:
<Instruct>: Select the best strategy cards for cvrp_construct evolutionary heuristic optimization
<Query>: Problem: cvrp_construct. Population features: route. Select 2 complementary cards.

positive_messages.content: cvrp_far_first: CVRP far-first: seed routes toward distant clusters, switch to nearest once en route.
cvrp_nearest_capacity: CVRP nearest-first: select closest feasible customer, treat capacity as constraint not score.

negative_messages.content: cvrp_savings: CVRP savings: score by Clarke-Wright savings, demand is binary feasibility only.
cvrp_sweep: CVRP sweep-style selection: keep each route within a depot-centered angular sector.
cvrp_regret_insertion: CVRP regret: prefer customers with high detour regret, capacity is feasibility not score.
